name: ASUS PRIME H610M-K D4-CSM Intel H610 (LGA 1700) mic-ATX motherboard, DDR4, PCIe 4.0, M.2 slot, Realtek 1 Gb Ethernet,USB 3.2 Gen 1 ports, SATA 6 Gbps, COM header, RGB header, 5X PROTECTION III
